How do I reset my mobile-app login password?

completion.content: Open the app and, on the sign-in screen, tap 'Forgot password.' You'll be asked to prove it's you with a one-time code sent to the phone number or email registered on your account. After you enter it, choose a new password of eight characters or more that includes at least one number and one symbol — it becomes active right away. Just note that resetting it logs you out of every other device you're signed in on.

I lost my debit card, what do I do?

completion.content: Sorry to hear that. The quickest move is to lock it right away: open the app, go to Cards, and tap Freeze card, or ring the round-the-clock lost-and-stolen line to report it. Standard delivery runs about 5 to 7 business days, or you can pay $25 to have it in 1 to 2. And don't worry about any charges someone racks up after you've reported it, those aren't your responsibility.
